title: populus fremontii subsp. mesetae
intro: Populus fremontii subsp. mesetae, also known as the Fremont cottonwood or Meseta cottonwood, is a subspecies of deciduous tree native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Populus fremontii subsp. mesetae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant is often prepared as a tea, salve, or infusion for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
